base_url.description: Younium API root. Also usable as a base URL override for tests/proxies.

username.description: Younium API username, used with password for Basic auth.

password.description: Younium API password/account key, used with username for Basic auth. Never logged.

legal_entity.description: Optional legal entity code, sent as the X-Younium-Legal-Entity request header when set. Omitted entirely when unset.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
